description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black finish and a compact, angular profile. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a front sight, while the forend is ribbed for improved grip, suggesting a pump-action mechanism. The stock is a pistol grip style, providing enhanced maneuverability in close-quarters environments, and the receiver appears solid and streamlined. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, offering protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall construction is primarily metal with some polymer components, typical for modern tactical shotguns. This weapon is designed for reliability and ease of use in urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a short barrel, ribbed pump forend, and pistol grip stock, built for urban use. Its robust, compact design features a rounded trigger guard and front sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the ribbed forend beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the pistol grip, ribbed pump, and short barrel with front sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump and stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and a short, tactical length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
